title: ECP5 Simulation fails with the latest oss-cad-suite
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.61+112 (git sha1 ac427a79b-dirty, aarch64-apple-darwin23.5-clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

1. Unzip the sample project zip below
2. Edit run.sh and point the `source` command to your recent oss-cad-suite dir.
3. Run the script `run.sh`. 

[work-pll-ecp5.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25030597/work-pll-ecp5.zip)

This sample project is a test to adapt Apio's command lines to the recent upgrade of Yosys's ECP5 libraries.

### Expected Behavior

All commands complete successfully and the script prints "All done OK".

### Actual Behavior

The iverilog simulation phase fails with errors

```
+ iverilog -g2012 -o _build/main_tb.out -DAPIO_SIM=1 -DINTERACTIVE_SIM -I/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5 /Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_sim.v main.v pll.v main_tb.v
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:2: error: 'FD1P3AX' has already been declared in this scope.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:2:      : It was declared here as a module.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:2: error: Module FD1P3AX was already declared here: /Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:2

/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:3: error: 'FD1P3AY' has already been declared in this scope.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:3:      : It was declared here as a module.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:3: error: Module FD1P3AY was already declared here: /Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:3

/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:4: error: 'FD1P3BX' has already been declared in this scope.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:4:      : It was declared here as a module.
/Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:4: error: Module FD1P3BX was already declared here: /Users/user/.apio/packages/oss-cad-suite/share/yosys/ecp5/cells_ff.vh:4

```
